name: pancreator-v2-prototype
description: Cursor-native agent workflow harness prototype with a dependency-free runtime.

scripts.doctor: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js doctor
scripts.validate: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js validate
scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test dist/tests/unit/*.test.js
scripts.test:migrations: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test dist/tests/migrations/*.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test dist/tests/integration/*.test.js
scripts.test:regression: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test dist/tests/regression/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && node scripts/run-quiet.mjs -- node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-include=dist/src/lib/** dist/tests/**/*.test.js
